  • Method Details

    • trustStore

      public TlsConfig.Builder trustStore(Path path, char[] password)
      Set the trust store. Required unless trustSystem() is used. Password may be null for password-less trust stores.

    • trustStoreType

      public TlsConfig.Builder trustStoreType(String type)
      Change trust store type. Default "PKCS12".

    • trustSystem

      public TlsConfig.Builder trustSystem()
      Use the JVM default trust anchors (typically the cacerts file).

    • trustStorePem

      public TlsConfig.Builder trustStorePem(Path... caPemPaths)
      Trust the CA certificate(s) in one or more PEM files. Every -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE----- block in each file is added to an in-memory trust store, so a chain file (leaf + intermediates) works as one argument, and multiple root CAs work as multiple arguments. Mutually exclusive with trustStore(Path, char[]).

    • keyStore

      public TlsConfig.Builder keyStore(Path path, char[] password, char[] keyPassword)
      Set the client key store for mTLS. When set, the client presents its certificate on TLS handshake.

    • keyStoreType

      public TlsConfig.Builder keyStoreType(String type)
      Change key store type. Default "PKCS12".

    • keyStorePem

      public TlsConfig.Builder keyStorePem(Path certChainPem, Path privateKeyPem)
      Present a client certificate and key in PEM form. Enables mTLS.

      certChainPem may contain a single leaf certificate or a concatenated chain (leaf first, then intermediates). privateKeyPem may be PKCS#8 (-----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY-----, the modern format) or PKCS#1 (-----BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY-----, the legacy format openssl req still emits by default). Encrypted PKCS#8 is not supported — convert with openssl pkcs8 -topk8 -nocrypt first, or use a PKCS12 keystore which handles passwords natively.

      Mutually exclusive with keyStore(Path, char[], char[]).

    • enabledProtocols

      public TlsConfig.Builder enabledProtocols(String... protocols)
      Override the enabled protocols. Default: TlsConfig.DEFAULT_PROTOCOLS.

    • enabledCipherSuites

      public TlsConfig.Builder enabledCipherSuites(String... suites)
      Override the enabled cipher suites. Default: JVM default (i.e. don't set).

    • verifyHostname

      public TlsConfig.Builder verifyHostname(boolean on)
      Toggle hostname verification. Default: true. Disable only for pinned-cert scenarios where the CN/SAN would not match the connect host (e.g. IP-only connect to a router with a hostname-only cert); document the risk in the caller's config.

    • handshakeTimeoutMs

      public TlsConfig.Builder handshakeTimeoutMs(int ms)
      TLS handshake timeout in ms. Default 15000.

    • needClientAuth

      public TlsConfig.Builder needClientAuth(boolean on)
      When used to build a server-side context, require client certificate authentication. Kept here for symmetry / future reuse; a client-side TlsTransport ignores this.

    • build

      public TlsConfig build()
